verse_text: Then the people went out and brought them and made themselves booths, each one on the roof of his house, or in their courtyards or the courts of the house of God, and in the open square of the Water Gate and in the open square of the Gate of Ephraim.

links.context: It is noteworthy that an eighth day was added to this celebration (see [[NEH.8:13]]-18). This section of 2 Maccabees is referring to the feast of Hanukkah, which celebrates fire and light (see note at 1:9).
